Music on Spotify is unbeatable. I don't have a problem with the ads, since I've already purchased Premium, and to be honest, Spotify works best with it. The experience is a lot better, so it is highly recommended. There are playlists with multiple artists of your taste that you can choose to listen to, and sometimes if you're lucky enough, a banger will come your way with the Shuffle mode to switch up the mood. A solid 10/10, 5 stars, no questions asked.
